overall.description: Nighttime driving gameplay footage on rural roads. The vehicle travels along asphalt roads lined with trees and utility poles, crossing two metal truss bridges. The scene features occasional traffic encounters and transitions between open road and structured bridge crossings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural two-lane highway with utility poles

events.description: blue truck overtakes on the left side of the vehicle
white truck approaches from opposite direction with headlights on

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on rural road at night with headlights illuminating the path ahead

notable_agents.action: blue truck overtaking on the left side
white truck approaching from opposite direction

two-lane asphalt road with center dividing line
dense green trees and bushes lining both sides of the road
clear night sky with visible stars
residential buildings with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a rural highway at night, headlights cutting through the darkness. Utility poles line the left side while dense vegetation borders both sides of the asphalt road. A blue truck overtakes on the left, followed by a white truck approaching from the opposite direction.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rural road, approaching a metal truss bridge visible in the distance

entered.detail: metal truss bridge with overhead structure and lighting visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving through open rural terrain, with the first metal truss bridge becoming visible in the distance. The utility poles move closer to the foreground as the vehicle advances, and the distant houses disappear from view behind the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal truss bridge with overhead lighting

events.description: entering covered bridge structure with metal truss framework
exiting bridge back to open rural road

agents.ego_description: crossing the metal truss bridge with overhead lights illuminating the structure

entered.detail: overhead lights mounted on the bridge truss structure
metal guard rails along the sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the first metal truss bridge, transitioning from open sky to a covered structure with artificial overhead lighting. Metal guard rails line both sides of the bridge deck. After crossing, the vehicle exits back to the open road.

scene_state.functional_zone: road with concrete retaining walls and drainage channel

events.description: entering section with high concrete retaining walls on both sides
oncoming vehicle with headlights visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: driving through a section with concrete walls and slopes, approaching the second bridge

notable_agents.action: oncoming car approaching with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: tall concrete walls and slopes lining both sides of the road
second metal truss bridge visible ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: After exiting the first bridge, the vehicle drives through a section with prominent concrete retaining walls and drainage structures. Vegetation returns along the roadside, and an oncoming vehicle appears in the distance as the second bridge approaches.

events.description: entering second metal truss bridge structure
exiting second bridge back to open rural road

agents.ego_description: crossing the second metal truss bridge and continuing along the rural highway

entered.detail: wooden and metal guard rails at bridge approach

segments.scene_description: The vehicle crosses the second metal truss bridge, similar in structure to the first, with overhead lighting and guard rails. After exiting, the road continues through open rural terrain with trees and utility poles lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous nighttime drive along a rural highway that alternates between open, tree-lined roads and the enclosed structures of two metal truss bridges. It begins with headlights cutting through the darkness as the vehicle navigates past a blue truck and an oncoming white truck amidst dense roadside vegetation and utility poles. As the terrain opens up, the camera advances toward the first metal truss bridge, transitioning from the open night sky into a covered corridor of artificial overhead lighting and metal guard rails. The scene then shifts back to the open road, passing concrete retaining walls and drainage structures before an oncoming vehicle appears in the distance. Finally, the vehicle crosses a second similar truss bridge before emerging once more into the rural landscape of trees and utility poles.
